description: BotFacebook autonomous system hooks with debug enforcement

hooks.command: cat "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT}/.claude/settings.local.json" 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"pendingTask"' >/dev/null && echo '[RESUME:PENDING] Found pending task - check settings.local.json and resume' || true

hooks.prompt: [SESSION:INIT] BotFacebook (Laravel 12 + React 19). Auto-load from mem: 1) Rules: [RULE:*][UNIVERSAL], [RULE:*][TECHNOLOGY:Laravel|React], [RULE:*][PROJECT:BotFacebook] - Priority: PROJECT>TECH>UNIVERSAL. 2) Tools: [MCP:REGISTRY], [SKILL:REGISTRY] for tools-manager. 3) Budget: Apply token limits per task size. 4) Check pendingTask in settings.local.json - if exists, resume automatically. 5) DEBUG WORKFLOW (ENFORCED): PreToolUse hook will BLOCK Edit/Write if workflow not followed. Use 'node .claude/scripts/update-debug-state.js' to track progress. Flow: DISCOVERY → DIAGNOSIS → PROCESS.
